search.query:
index="ms_schools_test" sourcetype="ssphp_ms_json" source="*.ndjson" host="ms-json" runkey="*" status!="error" earliest=0 latest=now | spath runkey | eventstats latest(runkey) as runkey_latest by business_unit | where runkey='runkey_latest'
| spath severity | spath check_category | spath check_name | spath business_unit
| search business_unit=$tkn_search|s$ AND $tkn_show$
| eval severity_score=case('severity'="critical",5, 'severity'="high",4, 'severity'="medium",3, 'severity'="low",2, 'severity'="info",1) | where severity_score>2
| table business_unit, severity, severity_score, check_category, check_name
| eventstats max(severity_score) as max_severity_score by business_unit, check_category | stats sum(eval(if('severity_score'='max_severity_score',1,0))) as max_category_count, values(max_severity_score) as max_severity_score by business_unit, check_category
| eval zz_components=if('check_category'="components",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_components_severity=if('check_category'="components",'max_severity_score',null()), zz_dns=if('check_category'="dns",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_dns_severity=if('check_category'="dns",'max_severity_score',null()), zz_email_security=if('check_category'="email_security",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_email_security_severity=if('check_category'="email_security",'max_severity_score',null()), zz_http_headers=if('check_category'="http_headers",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_http_headers_severity=if('check_category'="http_headers",'max_severity_score',null()), zz_network_exposure=if('check_category'="network_exposure",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_network_exposure_severity=if('check_category'="network_exposure",'max_severity_score',null()), zz_tls=if('check_category'="tls",'max_category_count',null()), zz_max_tls_severity=if('check_category'="tls",'max_severity_score',null())
| table business_unit, zz_* | rename zz_* as * | stats values(*) as * by business_unit
```| eval total_score=(coalesce('components',0)*coalesce('max_components_severity',0)) + (coalesce('dns',0)*coalesce('max_dns_severity',0)) + (coalesce('email_security',0)*coalesce('max_email_security_severity',0)) + (coalesce('http_headers',0)*coalesce('max_http_headers_severity',0)) + (coalesce('network_exposure',0)*coalesce('max_network_exposure_severity',0)) + (coalesce('tls',0)*coalesce('max_tls_severity',0))```
| eval total_blacks=if('max_components_severity'=5,coalesce('components',0),0), total_blacks=if('max_dns_severity'=5,'total_blacks'+coalesce('dns',0),'total_blacks'), total_blacks=if('max_email_security_severity'=5,'total_blacks'+coalesce('email_security',0),'total_blacks'), total_blacks=if('max_http_headers_severity'=5,'total_blacks'+coalesce('http_headers',0),'total_blacks'), total_blacks=if('max_network_exposure_severity'=5,'total_blacks'+coalesce('network_exposure',0),'total_blacks'), total_blacks=if('max_"tls_severity'=5,'total_blacks'+coalesce('"tls',0),'total_blacks') | eval total_reds=if('max_components_severity'=4,coalesce('components',0),0), total_reds=if('max_dns_severity'=4,'total_reds'+coalesce('dns',0),'total_reds'), total_reds=if('max_email_security_severity'=4,'total_reds'+coalesce('email_security',0),'total_reds'), total_reds=if('max_http_headers_severity'=4,'total_reds'+coalesce('http_headers',0),'total_reds'), total_reds=if('max_network_exposure_severity'=4,'total_reds'+coalesce('network_exposure',0),'total_reds'), total_reds=if('max_tls_severity'=4,'total_reds'+coalesce('tls',0),'total_reds') | eval total_oranges=if('max_components_severity'=3,coalesce('components',0),0), total_oranges=if('max_dns_severity'=3,'total_oranges'+coalesce('dns',0),'total_oranges'), total_oranges=if('max_email_security_severity'=3,'total_oranges'+coalesce('email_security',0),'total_oranges'), total_oranges=if('max_http_headers_severity'=3,'total_oranges'+coalesce('http_headers',0),'total_oranges'), total_oranges=if('max_network_exposure_severity'=3,'total_oranges'+coalesce('network_exposure',0),'total_oranges'), total_oranges=if('max_tls_severity'=3,'total_oranges'+coalesce('tls',0),'total_oranges')
| eval components='components'."¬".case('max_components_severity'=5,"black", 'max_components_severity'=4,"red", 'max_components_severity'=3,"orange"), dns='dns'."¬".case('max_dns_severity'=5,"black", 'max_dns_severity'=4,"red", 'max_dns_severity'=3,"orange"), email_security='email_security'."¬".case('max_email_security_severity'=5,"black", 'max_email_security_severity'=4,"red", 'max_email_security_severity'=3,"orange"), http_headers='http_headers'."¬".case('max_http_headers_severity'=5,"black", 'max_http_headers_severity'=4,"red", 'max_http_headers_severity'=3,"orange"), network_exposure='network_exposure'."¬".case('max_network_exposure_severity'=5,"black", 'max_network_exposure_severity'=4,"red", 'max_network_exposure_severity'=3,"orange"), tls='tls'."¬".case('max_tls_severity'=5,"black", 'max_tls_severity'=4,"red", 'max_tls_severity'=3,"orange")
| sort 0 - total_blacks, total_reds, total_oranges | table business_unit, components, dns, email_security, http_headers, network_exposure, tls```, total_blacks, total_reds, total_oranges```
